en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the founding pine of Nishibetsu. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the cherry tree at the experimental station. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.name: オクユキウスの大楢
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the great oak (nara) of Okuyukiusu. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.name: 風連の楢林・開墾記念のスモモ

en.name_romaji: Fūren no Narabayashi / Kaikon Kinen no Sumomo
en.name_en: Furen Oak Grove and Plum of Land-Reclamation Commemoration
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the Furen oak grove and the plum tree commemorating land reclamation. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the pine tree of Royama. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the lone pine of Hombetsukai. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the oak (kashiwa) at the town office branch. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the Okuyukiusu stop on the former Betsukai village-operated railway Furen Line. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the Rokki oak (kashiwa) of the Hirono land reclamation. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.name: 上西春別小学校の柏

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of the oak (kashiwa) at Kaminishibetsu Elementary School. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.
This is a tangible cultural property consisting of documents of the Kaga family. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.name: 野付半島沖マンモスゾウ化石群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Mammoth Fossil Cluster off the Notsuke Peninsula
en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site, scenic beauty, natural monument) consisting of a cluster of mammoth fossils found off the Notsuke Peninsula. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.name: 厨子入南矢臼別馬頭観世音菩薩坐像

en.name_romaji: Zushiiri Minamiyausubetsu Batō Kanzeon Bosatsu Zazō
en.name_en: Seated Bato-Kannon Statue of Minamiyausubetsu in a Portable Shrine
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a seated statue of Bato-Kannon (Hayagriva Avalokitesvara) of Minamiyausubetsu, enshrined in a portable shrine (zushi). It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.

items.name: 旧柏野尋常小学校奉安殿

en.name_en: Repository of the Former Kashiwano Ordinary Elementary School
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the hoanden (imperial portrait repository) of the former Kashiwano ordinary elementary school. It is a town-designated cultural property of Betsukai Town.
